name: team_task_error
description: Mark a task as failed or encountering an error and store error details. Use this when a task cannot be completed due to errors, API failures, missing resources, or other blocking issues. Helps with debugging and task management.

team_id.description: Team ID containing the task. The requesting agent must be a member of this team.

agent_id.description: Agent ID reporting the error. Must be the agent who claimed this task.

task_id.description: ID of the task that encountered an error

error_message.description: Detailed error message or description of what went wrong

error_code.description: Specific error code if available (e.g., HTTP status code, API error code)

attempted_actions.description: List of actions attempted before encountering the error

retry_count.description: Number of times this task has been retried

is_retryable.description: Whether this task can/should be retried later

suggested_retry_delay.description: Suggested delay before retry (e.g., '15 minutes', '1 hour', '24 hours')

workaround_suggestions.description: Possible workarounds or alternative approaches to complete the task

requires_human_intervention.description: Whether this error requires human intervention to resolve

context_data.description: Additional context data that might help with debugging or resolution

parameters.error_message: GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Limit: 5000, Used: 5000, Resets at: 2024-01-15T16:00:00Z
Slack API token is invalid or expired. Unable to send messages to channel.
Cannot complete code review task because dependent task 'run_tests' failed
workaround_suggestions: Skip tests and do manual review
